privateOverlayRelayHost.description: Private IPv4, CGNAT, and ULA IPv6 relay literals are only valid when authenticated route refresh explicitly marks a user-managed private overlay.

loopbackRelayHost.description: Loopback relay hosts are valid for authenticated route refresh only when explicitly scoped to USB reverse debugging.

routeRefreshRelayHost.description: Authenticated route.refresh relay host values are route material, not URLs. They must be non-empty, whitespace-free host literals or names without paths, queries, fragments, user-info, mDNS-local names, unspecified addresses, link-local addresses, multicast addresses, or broadcast literals.
